attributes.title: [SQL Server OTel] Concurrency & errors
attributes.description: Deadlocks, lock waits, timeouts, blocked processes, and execution errors.

params.markdown:
## [SQL Server OTel] Concurrency & errors

This dashboard tracks concurrency and error metrics:
- Deadlock rate (any sustained non-zero is critical)
- Lock wait rate and lock timeouts
- Blocked processes (active blocking chains)
- Execution errors from the engine
- OS wait durations by wait type

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.timeout.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.lock.timeout.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.timeout.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.lock.timeout.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS errors = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS errors = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS wait_delta = SUM(INCREASE(metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.count))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS wait_delta = SUM(INCREASE(metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.count))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.timeout.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.lock.timeout.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.timeout.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.lock.timeout.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: OS wait duration by wait type

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.os.wait.duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS wait_ms = SUM(INCREASE(metrics.sqlserver.os.wait.duration)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), wait_type = COALESCE(attributes.wait.type, wait.type, "unknown")
| EVAL wait_ms = wait_ms * 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.os.wait.duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS wait_ms = SUM(INCREASE(metrics.sqlserver.os.wait.duration)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), wait_type = COALESCE(attributes.wait.type, wait.type, "unknown")
| EVAL wait_ms = wait_ms * 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Top wait types by total duration

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.os.wait.duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS wait_ms = SUM(INCREASE(metrics.sqlserver.os.wait.duration)) BY wait_type = COALESCE(attributes.wait.type, wait.type, "unknown")
| EVAL wait_ms = wait_ms * 1000
| SORT wait_ms DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.os.wait.duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS wait_ms = SUM(INCREASE(metrics.sqlserver.os.wait.duration)) BY wait_type = COALESCE(attributes.wait.type, wait.type, "unknown")
| EVAL wait_ms = wait_ms * 1000
| SORT wait_ms DESC
| LIMIT 10

attributes.title: Compilation vs recompilation rate over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.batch.sql_compilation.rate IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.batch.sql_recompilation.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS compile_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.batch.sql_compilation.rate), recompile_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.batch.sql_recompilation.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| EVAL compile_rate = COALESCE(compile_rate, 0.0), recompile_rate = COALESCE(recompile_rate, 0.0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.batch.sql_compilation.rate IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.batch.sql_recompilation.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS compile_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.batch.sql_compilation.rate), recompile_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.batch.sql_recompilation.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| EVAL compile_rate = COALESCE(compile_rate, 0.0), recompile_rate = COALESCE(recompile_rate, 0.0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.full_scan.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS scan_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.database.full_scan.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.full_scan.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS scan_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.database.full_scan.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate), lock_wait_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate), blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked))), exec_errors = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors))) BY instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| EVAL deadlock_rate = COALESCE(deadlock_rate, 0.0), lock_wait_rate = COALESCE(lock_wait_rate, 0.0), blocked = COALESCE(blocked, 0), exec_errors = COALESCE(exec_errors, 0)
| SORT deadlock_rate DESC, blocked DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate), lock_wait_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.lock.wait.rate), blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked))), exec_errors = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors))) BY instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| EVAL deadlock_rate = COALESCE(deadlock_rate, 0.0), lock_wait_rate = COALESCE(lock_wait_rate, 0.0), blocked = COALESCE(blocked, 0), exec_errors = COALESCE(exec_errors, 0)
| SORT deadlock_rate DESC, blocked DESC
| LIMIT 20
